title: Martin Lin
compiled_truth: Martin Lin is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-10 to 2002-02-13), Martin Lin sent 15 and received 252 emails, totalling 267 interactions. Top correspondents: [Vince Kaminski](people/vince-kaminski) (7), [J Kaminski](people/j-kaminski) (5), [Doug Gilbert-Smith](people/doug-gilbert-smith) (3), [Ryan Williams](people/ryan-williams) (2), [Lance Cunningham](people/lance-cunningham) (1).
